title: BACK TO PRESENT — Sara: 'What's your gift this year?'
prompt: Medium three-shot back in the cozy anniversary living room — twinkling fairy lights, beige sectional couch with autumn-orange throw, warm lamp glow. @Papa center on the couch, finishing the story. @Sara curled at his left side, head TILTS curious, right hand tugs gently on his sleeve. @Eva snuggled at his right side, listening with wide eyes. Papa: "...and that's how our family came to be." Mouth SMILES warm. Sara: "What are you giving her THIS year?" Eyes SPARKLE conspiratorially, mouth WIDENS. Papa (whispering like a secret): "Something VERY special..."
